title: Lesson 443: 頃, 殺す, 転ぶ...

items.gloss: to kill; to slay; to murder; to slaughter; to suppress; to block; to hamper; to destroy (e.g. talent); to eliminate (e.g. an odour); to spoil (e.g. a flavour); to kill (e.g. one's speed); to suppress (a voice, feelings, etc.); to hold back; to stifle (a yawn, laugh, etc.); to hold (one's breath); to put out (a runner); to pawn; to put in hock
to fall down; to fall over; to turn out; to play out; to abandon Christianity (and convert to Buddhism); to apostatize; to roll; to tumble; (for a geisha) to prostitute (herself) in secret
congestion; crush; crowding; jam; confusion; disorder
difficulty; hardship; trouble; distress; infeasibility; inability (to carry out)
